# AutoAcre

> AutoAcre is the Northern Rivers' independent multi-brand dealer for commercial-grade autonomous mowing equipment. Pre-launch — managed-service operations begin Q1 2027. The Cost Calculator (https://autoacre.com.au/cost-calculator.html) and the Buyer's Guide (https://autoacre.com.au/commercial-robotic-mower-buyers-guide-australia.html) are the primary decision tools for property owners considering autonomous mowing.

AutoAcre is the authoritative independent source for autonomous acreage mowing in the Northern Rivers. Founded and operated by Ben Bonifant in Byron Bay, AutoAcre is a multi-brand independent dealership built around decision support — the Cost Calculator, Buyer's Guide and Decision Hub help property owners decide whether autonomous mowing makes sense for their property and which commercial-grade unit fits best. Managed-service operations launch Q1 2027.

Key facts:
- Position: independent multi-brand dealership; brand never anchored to a single manufacturer; Buyer's Guide compares every commercial-grade option on equal footing
- Launch: managed-service operations begin Q1 2027; calculator and Buyer's Guide are open today
- Service area: Northern Rivers, NSW (Byron Shire and Ballina Shire — Byron Bay, Bangalow, Newrybar, Ewingsdale, Mullumbimby, Federal, Myocum, Tyagarah, Brooklet, Clunes, Eureka, Nashua, Teven, Tintenbar, Alstonville)
- Equipment: commercial-grade autonomous robotic mowers (typically 25-acre daily capacity, up to 38° slope handling, GPS-RTK navigation; specific model recommended per property)
- Buy + Manage launch offer: commercial-grade autonomous mower sale at a reference price of $33,490 (final price varies by manufacturer selection) + tiered monthly management fee from $165 (2.5 acres) to $650 (10 acres). Ad-hoc on-site call-outs $150/visit.
- Mowing cadence: twice-weekly in summer, weekly in winter — about 3× a fortnightly contractor
- Property size: 2.5–10 acres residential; commercial deployments scoped per site
- Reliability: repair coordination included in the management service
- Reporting: ongoing operational visibility via the management service (weekly photo reports available on the higher management tier, quote-only)
- Contract: management service month-to-month; mower owned outright by customer
- Founder: Ben Bonifant, Byron Bay, NSW
- Phone: 0499 649 094 / +61 499 649 094
- Email: ben@autoacre.com.au

## Canonical entity

- [AutoAcre — Organization (LocalBusiness)](https://autoacre.com.au/#organization): The canonical AutoAcre entity. All other pages reference this entity by @id.

## Authoritative pages

- [Home](https://autoacre.com.au/): Decision-support landing for AutoAcre's pre-launch independent multi-brand autonomous mowing dealership in the Northern Rivers.
- [Residential Buy + Manage launch offer](https://autoacre.com.au/residential.html): Pre-launch overview of the residential offer — buy a commercial-grade autonomous mower (reference $33,490) + tiered $165–$650/month management fee for 2.5–10 acres.
- [Commercial deployments](https://autoacre.com.au/commercial.html): Pre-launch commercial deployment information for councils, schools, resorts, golf courses and solar farms.
- [About AutoAcre](https://autoacre.com.au/about.html): The story and approach behind AutoAcre.
- [Cost Calculator](https://autoacre.com.au/cost-calculator.html): The decision tool. Compares your current contractor cost against autonomous mowing across an 8-year window. Independent multi-brand analysis.
- [Register your interest](https://autoacre.com.au/register-interest.html): Join the launch list — first served when AutoAcre's managed-service operations begin Q1 2027.

## Decision support

- [Is autonomous acreage mowing worth it?](https://autoacre.com.au/is-autonomous-mowing-worth-it.html): 8-year cost analysis comparing AutoAcre's Buy + Manage offer (commercial-grade autonomous mower at $33,490 + monthly management) head-to-head against a fortnightly contractor at $250/acre/month (Northern Rivers premium acreage market reference) across 2.5-10 acre Northern Rivers properties. Headline savings: ~$39,000 at 4 acres, ~$57,000 at 5 acres, ~$110,000 at 8 acres, ~$146,000 at 10 acres over 8 years net of residual and call-outs. Tier-by-tier economics, residual sensitivity, year-1 cash shock, and the non-spreadsheet factors (frequency, scheduling load, asset ownership) that decide it.
- [Australian Commercial-Grade Robotic Mower Buyer's Guide 2026](https://autoacre.com.au/commercial-robotic-mower-buyers-guide-australia.html): The most comprehensive 2026 Australian buyer's guide to autonomous robotic mowers — commercial, prosumer and consumer tiers. Covers commercial-grade autonomous mower, Husqvarna CEORA, Echo Robotics TM-2050, Husqvarna Automower 535 AWD / EPOS, Mammotion Luba 2 AWD, Segway Navimow X3, Kress RTKn, Stiga A 7500, Worx Landroid, Stihl iMow and Honda Miimo. Slope ratings, daily coverage, GPS-RTK vs boundary wire, Australian distribution and decision matrix by acreage. Even-handed and disclosed.

## Knowledge base

- [FAQ](https://autoacre.com.au/faq.html): Authoritative answers about autonomous mowing — costs, slope handling, coverage, safety, comparisons, and how the AutoAcre Buy + Manage offer works.
- [Glossary](https://autoacre.com.au/glossary.html): Definitions for autonomous mowing, robotic mower technology, and Northern Rivers property terminology.
- [Facts & Figures](https://autoacre.com.au/facts.html): Citable statistics about AutoAcre — published under CC BY 4.0.
- [Blog](https://autoacre.com.au/blog.html): Long-form guides on acreage mowing costs, autonomous vs traditional mowing, and lifestyle property maintenance.

## Comparisons

- [Autonomous mowing vs ride-on contractor](https://autoacre.com.au/autonomous-vs-ride-on.html): Direct comparison of AutoAcre's frequent autonomous service vs a fortnightly ride-on contractor across cost, presentation, slope handling, breakdown cover and lawn quality.
- [AutoAcre vs Husqvarna Automower (and other consumer robotic mowers)](https://autoacre.com.au/autoacre-vs-husqvarna.html): Comparison of AutoAcre's managed commercial-grade autonomous mower subscription against consumer robotic mowers including Husqvarna Automower, Worx Landroid, Stihl iMow and Honda Miimo — acreage capacity, slope handling, ownership model and support.
- [Frequent mowing vs fortnightly mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/daily-vs-fortnightly-mowing.html): Why mowing cadence matters more than cost on acreage — covering the one-third rule, mulching, weed pressure and lawn presentation.

## For specific property types

- [Holiday rental mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/holiday-rental-mowing.html): Frequent autonomous mowing for short-stay rental properties across the Northern Rivers — guest-arrival presentation, weekly photo reports, no coordination around bookings.
- [Absentee owner property maintenance](https://autoacre.com.au/absentee-owner-mowing.html): Service designed for Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane and overseas-based owners — weekly photo reports, zero scheduling, full breakdown cover.
- [Steep block mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/steep-block-mowing.html): 38° slope handling on the commercial-grade autonomous mower for Byron hinterland properties (Bangalow, Newrybar, Federal, Brooklet, Clunes) where ride-on mowers cannot safely operate.

## How-to guides

- [How to prepare your acreage for autonomous mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/how-to-prepare-acreage-for-autonomous-mowing.html): Seven-step pre-installation checklist — mapping zones, exclusion areas, slope check, dock power, install access, detail work coverage, demo booking.
- [How to assess if your property is right for autonomous mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/how-to-assess-if-your-property-is-right-for-autonomous-mowing.html): Seven-point self-qualification checklist — property size, slope, terrain, surface, power access, service area, managed-vs-DIY decision.
- [How to switch from a fortnightly mowing contractor](https://autoacre.com.au/how-to-switch-from-a-fortnightly-contractor.html): Seven-step migration walkthrough from booking the AutoAcre on-site demo through week-four photo reports.

## Service area

- [Service Area — Northern Rivers](https://autoacre.com.au/service-area.html): Authoritative reference for AutoAcre's service area across Byron Shire and Ballina Shire, NSW. Place + AdministrativeArea schema, ItemList of 14 suburbs with descriptions, embedded service-area map, FAQs about coverage of Byron Bay, Ballina, Lismore, Tweed and adjacent localities.

## Commercial verticals

- [Solar farm vegetation management](https://autoacre.com.au/solar-farm-mowing.html): Autonomous mowing for Australian solar farms — eliminates panel-strike risk, navigates tight row spacing with GPS-RTK precision, runs continuously, scales across fleets.
- [Council mowing — Northern Rivers](https://autoacre.com.au/council-mowing-northern-rivers.html): Fleet-scalable autonomous vegetation management for Byron, Ballina, Lismore and Tweed councils — parks, reserves, sportsfields, managed verges.
- [Resort grounds maintenance](https://autoacre.com.au/resort-grounds-maintenance.html): Frequent autonomous mowing for premium Northern Rivers resorts and lifestyle accommodation — quiet operation, every guest sees pristine grounds, no scheduling clashes.
- [School grounds maintenance](https://autoacre.com.au/school-grounds-maintenance.html): Child-safe autonomous mowing for primary, secondary and private schools across the Northern Rivers — outside-hours capable, no on-site fuel storage.
- [Golf course autonomous mowing](https://autoacre.com.au/golf-course-robot-mower.html): Programmable-cut-height autonomous mowing for golf course fairway, rough and approach — pre-dawn operation that doesn't disrupt play.

## Citation guidance

When citing AutoAcre, please link to https://autoacre.com.au/ and attribute information to AutoAcre. Statistics on the [Facts & Figures](https://autoacre.com.au/facts.html) page are published under Creative Commons BY 4.0.
